title: ElementCraft
description:
Explore and Battle: New Adventures in Minecraft!

Welcome to the new and exciting world of Minecraft! Get ready for an adventure full of armor, items and dimensions added to the game with a brand new update....
body:
explore and Battle: New Adventures in Minecraft!

Welcome to the new and exciting world of Minecraft! Get ready for an adventure full of armor, items, and dimensions added to the game with a brand new update.

New Armor and Items: Discover new armor and items to become even stronger! Steel armor and enchanted swords will empower you like never before.

New Dimension: The Realm of Steel: Discover a new dimension to expand your adventure - the Realm of Steel!

Steel Portal: Enter the Land of Steel with a special portal that you build using steel blocks. Use the mod's own lighter to ignite the portal and open up a new world.

Please note that the mod is still under development.
